name: Glorious Golden Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside 1/4 cup of this mixture.
2. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add dry ingredients and milk, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix walnuts, raisins, pineapple, candied cherries, lemon rind, and the reserved flour mixture until all are thoroughly coated.
6. Stir this into the batter.
7. Grease a 10-inch tube pan and line it with wax paper.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake at 275 degrees F for 2 hours and 45 minutes or until done.
9. Cool in the pan for 30 minutes before turning off heat and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Wrap tightly in foil and store refrigerated up to 4 weeks.
11. Before serving, prepare pineapple glaze by combining 1 cup sifted confectioners' sugar with 2 tablespoons pineapple juice until smooth.
12. Frost the top of the cake and allow glaze to drip down the sides.
13. Decorate with pecan halves.
Makes one 5 lb fruitcake.
